description: Access Context Manager is a Google Cloud security service for defining and managing attribute-based access controls such as access levels, service perimeters, and related policies. It is used to enforce context-aware access to Google Cloud resources and services.
summary: Google Cloud Access Context Manager exposes a REST API at `https://accesscontextmanager.googleapis.com/` and management commands through the `gcloud access-context-manager` CLI; both use Google Cloud OAuth-based authentication.
